title: The Fabulous Joe

actors: Walter Abel, Margot Grahame, Marie Wilson
plot: The adventures of a talking dog, Joe, who advises henpecked Milo Terkel to muster the courage to confront his dominating wife Emily and assorted in-laws while tackling a buxom blonde who just happens to undress in the Terkels' apa...
